evals.prompt: 帮我把这篇文章里的 mermaid 图表转成图片，要商务风格
evals.expected_output: PNG images generated with fresh-business style applied to all diagrams
expectations: All mermaid diagrams are converted to PNG files
The fresh-business style is applied (white/light background, blue accents)
Output images are saved to the output directory

evals.prompt: Convert the flowchart in my markdown to a dark-themed image for my tech blog
evals.expected_output: PNG image with dark-tech style applied
expectations: Dark-tech style applied (dark background #1a1a2e, cyan/purple accents)
Image width is appropriate for web display

evals.prompt: I need to put this sequence diagram in my WeChat article, can you make it 900px wide?
evals.expected_output: PNG image with 900px width optimized for WeChat Official Account
expectations: Sequence diagram is fully visible and readable

evals.prompt: Make this gantt chart look more hand-drawn and sketchy for my brainstorming session
evals.expected_output: PNG image with hand-drawn style applied
expectations: Hand-drawn style applied (warm paper background, Comic Sans MS font)
Gantt chart bars and labels are visible

evals.prompt: 转换这个 mermaid 类图为 SVG 格式，我需要矢量图
evals.expected_output: SVG format output for scalable vector graphics
expectations: Output is SVG format not PNG
